name: Solid Access Manager
notes: Phase 1 (P2 of full-solid-ecosystem docs/design/access-management-proposal.md @ 8a069f4): standalone owner console over EXISTING pod surfaces — grant dashboard (by-resource/by-agent), revoke/edit with If-Match CAS, data-class view via type indexes, ODRL access-request inbox, client-side CAS-pinned approve/deny pipeline with deterministic grantIds + DPV consent receipts. It AUTHORS ACLs — security-critical; every ACL write goes through @solid/object typed accessors, never hand-built triples.
